nodes.label: P4.0 — the bench + the difficulty axis (A1)
nodes.description: Validates the whole characterization apparatus (exact closed-form Bayes error, three racers, gap+cost meters) and dials difficulty via cluster overlap on a synthetic Gaussian generator, Bayes error sweeping 0.022->0.371, 5 seeds.

nodes.label: P4.0 verdict: bench ADOPTED; A1 gap CLOSES with difficulty (capture is the real read)
nodes.description: Raw gap-to-BP closes +0.050->+0.011 (Bayes 0.02->0.32) then upticks to +0.035 at 0.37 (overfitting near chance) -- confounded by the shrinking achievable window. Bayes-normalized capture falls monotonically 0.917->0.679, the honest difficulty signal. OURS beats Mono-Forward everywhere and generalizes best until the near-chance cell. 80/20 cost claim NOT supported per-pass (OURS 47k vs BP 52k @easy -> 47k vs 77k @hard) -- it lives in gate+sleep cadence, not the static meter.
nodes.rationale: First tile of the capability map; flags that Phase 5's cost meter must add gate+sleep-cadence to substantiate the 80/20 claim.
